sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Robert Half Inc. to Release Q4 2025 Earnings on January 29
feed.summary: Robert Half Inc. (RHI) is scheduled to release its Q4 2025 earnings on January 29, 2026, at 4:05 p.m. EST, followed by a conference call at 5 p.m. EST. The company, recognized as a leading specialized talent solutions firm, has an average 1-year price target of $29.29 from Wall Street analysts. Recent analyst downgrades from Truist and BNP Paribas Exane cite concerns over increased SG&A, higher tax rates, and potential impacts of AI on the employment agency sector.

feed.title: Emerald Mutual Fund Advisers Trust Reduces Position in Soleno Therapeutics, Inc. $SLNO
feed.summary: Emerald Mutual Fund Advisers Trust reduced its stake in Soleno Therapeutics by 6.3%, now owning 379,900 shares valued at $25.7 million. Despite the reduction, institutional investors collectively hold 97.42% of the company's stock. Soleno Therapeutics recently surpassed quarterly earnings expectations, and several analysts have raised their price targets and reiterated "Buy" ratings, though a "Sell" rating still exists from a minority firm.

feed.title: SiTime Corporation $SITM Shares Acquired by Emerald Mutual Fund Advisers Trust
feed.summary: Emerald Mutual Fund Advisers Trust increased its stake in SiTime Corporation (NASDAQ:SITM) by 10.6% during the third quarter, now owning 98,689 shares valued at $29.7 million, making it their 12th largest holding. Despite strong quarterly earnings that beat analyst estimates, the company reported negative net margin and ROE, while insider selling has been notable, with CEO Rajesh Vashist and other insiders selling a total of 21,500 shares worth over $6.79 million in the last 90 days. Analysts currently rate SiTime as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $360.63.

feed.title: PIMCO High Income Fund (NYSE:PHK) Shares Pass Above Two Hundred Day Moving Average - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: PIMCO High Income Fund (NYSE:PHK) shares recently traded above their two hundred-day moving average, reaching $5.00 against an average of $4.88. The company also declared a monthly dividend of $0.048, yielding 11.6% annually. Institutional investors have been active, with several firms adjusting their stakes in PHK during recent quarters.

feed.title: |【即時新聞】Pacer Lunt MidCap Multi-Factor Alternator ETF 宣布季度股息發放
feed.summary: |Pacer Lunt MidCap Multi-Factor Alternator ETF（PAMC）宣布將發放每股0.3544美元的季度股息，股息將於2024年1月5日支付，股息記錄日為2025年12月30日。該基金昨日收盤價為47.6190美元，下跌0.84%，交易量顯著增長157.90%達到1746股。此舉顯示了基金持續回饋投資人的承諾，並且市場交易活躍度有所提升。

feed.title: Enphase Stock Is Surging Toward Best Week In Over A Year: Wall Street Piles Back In Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Enphase Energy (ENPH) stock is experiencing its best week since July 2024, surging nearly 16% as Wall Street analysts, including Citi and Goldman Sachs, have upgraded their ratings and price targets. This renewed bullish sentiment comes ahead of the company's Q4 earnings report, with analysts noting limited downside risk, stronger-than-expected demand, and market share gains for the solar inverter manufacturer. Retail investor sentiment has also turned "extremely bullish" on the stock.

feed.title: CapWealth Advisors LLC Trims Stock Position in Exxon Mobil Corporation $XOM
feed.summary: CapWealth Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in Exxon Mobil Corporation by 74.6% in Q3, selling over 15,000 shares and retaining 5,301 shares valued at $598,000. Despite this, other institutional investors like Norges Bank and First Trust increased their holdings, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of around $132 for XOM. Exxon Mobil recently boosted its quarterly dividend to $1.03 per share, representing an annualized yield of 3.1%.

feed.title: Chicago Partners Investment Group LLC Acquires 3,758 Shares of Expedia Group, Inc. $EXPE
feed.summary: Chicago Partners Investment Group LLC significantly increased its stake in Expedia Group, Inc. by 87.4% in the third quarter, purchasing 3,758 shares to bring its total holdings to 8,060 shares valued at approximately $1.816 million. Despite corporate insiders selling shares recently, the company exceeded Q3 earnings estimates with EPS of $7.57 on $4.41 billion in revenue. Analysts currently maintain a "Hold" consensus rating with a target price of $289.13, although some have raised their price objectives as high as $350.

feed.title: Brown & Brown consolidates healthcare risk platform
feed.summary: Brown & Brown has launched Brown & Brown Healthcare, a national healthcare practice that brings together over 140 specialists into a unified platform. This initiative consolidates the company's healthcare capabilities to provide integrated, all-lines risk management solutions for various healthcare organizations. The practice will be co-led by Matthew Siciliani and Tracy Hoffman, with strategic guidance from Bob Dubraski, and aims to support hundreds of customers and place billions in premiums in both US and international markets.

feed.title: Campbell & CO Investment Adviser LLC Sells 22,923 Shares of Omnicom Group Inc. $OMC
feed.summary: Campbell & CO Investment Adviser LLC significantly reduced its stake in Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE:OMC) by 80.5% in the 3rd quarter, selling 22,923 shares and retaining 5,566 shares valued at $454,000. This comes as Omnicom recently beat quarterly earnings expectations with $2.24 EPS on $4.04 billion revenue and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.80. Institutional investors own a substantial 91.97% of the company's stock, which currently holds a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $92.14.

feed.title: Country Trust Bank Sells 31,995 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Country Trust Bank reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 7.3% in the third quarter, selling 31,995 shares and retaining 408,371 shares valued at $99.46 million. Despite notable insider selling from CEO Sundar Pichai and others, Alphabet reported a strong Q3 earnings beat and maintains a "Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with rising price targets. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.21, paid on December 15th.

feed.title: Forum Financial Management LP Lowers Stake in Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: Forum Financial Management LP reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 6.8% in Q3, selling over 10,000 shares and ending the period with holdings valued at $34.43 million. This comes amidst significant insider selling totaling nearly $58 million in the last 90 days. Despite this, analyst sentiment remains generally positive with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and several raised price targets for Alphabet.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL is Cannon Advisors Inc.'s 4th Largest Position
feed.summary: Cannon Advisors Inc. increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) by 7.0% in Q3, making it their 4th largest position with a value of $6.83 million. Despite recent insider selling totaling $57.9 million, institutional ownership remains strong at 40.03%, with major investors like Vanguard and Norges Bank. Analyst sentiment is largely bullish due to strong quarterly earnings, AI integration, and Waymo's expansion, though some caution exists regarding technical consolidation and potential short-term volatility.

feed.title: Endeavor Private Wealth Inc. Grows Stock Position in Apple Inc. $AAPL
feed.summary: Endeavor Private Wealth Inc. significantly increased its stake in Apple Inc. by 39.6% during the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 12,138 shares valued at $3.09 million. This move comes as institutional investors now own approximately 67.7% of Apple, despite an insider, Chris Kondo, selling a portion of his shares. The article highlights positive catalysts such as Apple's reported AI initiatives and regained smartphone market share in China, alongside potential risks from regulatory issues in India and product discounts in China.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive & WHO Foundation Partner for Oral Health
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive has announced a multi-year partnership with the WHO Foundation to enhance global oral health education and awareness. This collaboration aims to address the significant challenge of oral diseases, which affect 3.7 billion people globally but are often overlooked in healthcare systems. The initiative will focus on scaling oral health education, supporting policy development, and increasing the prioritization of oral health as a public health concern, building on Colgate's extensive experience in oral health initiatives.

feed.title: Analysts Conflicted on These Consumer Cyclical Names: EVgo (EVGO) and International Paper Co (IP)
feed.summary: RBC Capital maintained a Buy rating for EVgo (EVGO) with a $7.00 price target, reflecting a "Strong Buy" consensus among analysts with a $5.65 price target. J.P. Morgan reiterated a Hold rating for International Paper Co (IP) with a p3400.00 price target, aligning with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and a $47.15 price target. The article highlights analyst opinions on these two consumer cyclical companies.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Docebo (DCBO), Rigetti Computing (RGTI) and Palo Alto Networks (PANW)
feed.summary: This article highlights bullish sentiments from three analysts regarding technology companies Docebo (DCBO), Rigetti Computing (RGTI), and Palo Alto Networks (PANW). Robert Young of Canaccord Genuity maintained a Buy rating on Docebo with a $46.00 price target. Vijay Rakesh of Mizuho Securities reiterated a Buy rating on Rigetti Computing, while Gregg Moskowitz, also from Mizuho Securities, maintained a Buy rating on Palo Alto Networks with a $220.00 price target.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank upgrades Applied Materials stock rating to Buy on strong outlook
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has upgraded Applied Materials (NASDAQ:AMAT) from Hold to Buy, increasing its price target to $390.00 from $275.00, driven by an optimistic outlook for the wafer fabrication equipment (WFE) market in 2026 and 2027. The semiconductor equipment giant, currently trading at $318.79, is viewed as undervalued compared to peers, with analysts expecting its valuation gap to narrow. This upgrade aligns with recent positive developments, including consistent dividend increases and favorable analyst ratings from firms like KeyBanc, RBC Capital, Stifel, and TD Cowen, all highlighting the company's strong market positioning and growth prospects.

feed.title: F/m Opportunistic Income ETF (NASDAQ:XFIX) Shares Up 0.2% – Time to Buy?
feed.summary: F/m Opportunistic Income ETF (NASDAQ:XFIX) saw its stock price rise by 0.2% on Thursday, with 94 shares traded. The ETF recently announced a dividend of $0.2028 per share, paid on December 31st. Crews Bank & Trust also acquired a new stake of 1,000 shares in the company during the second quarter.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand to Showcase Advanced Industrial Energy Solutions at India Energy Week 2026
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand will participate in India Energy Week 2026 to showcase its advanced industrial energy solutions, including high-efficiency compression technologies and digital platforms like Helix and EcoPlant. The company aims to support India's industrial energy transformation and sustainability goals by helping industries reduce energy intensity and carbon impact. Sunil Khanduja, Managing Director, CSS India & SAARC, highlighted the company's commitment to driving energy efficiency and exploring collaborations for a sustainable, energy-efficient future in India.

feed.title: Dr Reddy's to HUL - Prashanth Tapse of Mehta Equities suggests stocks to buy in the short term
feed.summary: Prashanth Tapse of Mehta Equities suggests buying Hindustan Unilever Ltd (HUL), Asian Paints Ltd, and Dr Reddy's Laboratories Ltd for the short term, citing technical indicators for each stock. The market dipped slightly with Nifty 50 at 25,222 and Sensex at 82,021.20, but bullish momentum is expected to continue as trade-war fears ease and the US economy shows strong growth.

feed.title: SLB Gears Up For Q4 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
feed.summary: SLB (NYSE: SLB) is preparing to release its fourth-quarter earnings, with analysts anticipating earnings of 74 cents per share and revenue of $9.55 billion. The company recently secured a five-year contract with Saudi Aramco. Ahead of the earnings call, several accurate Wall Street analysts have updated their ratings and price targets for SLB, with most maintaining positive stances and raising price targets.

feed.title: Navy asks RTX Raytheon to upgrade navigation, communications, and jam hardening of Tomahawk missile
feed.summary: The U.S. Navy has awarded RTX Corp. a $380.8 million contract to upgrade and recertify its BGM-109 Tomahawk land-attack missiles. This modernization effort will extend the service life of Block IV missiles by 15 years, transforming them into Block V variants with improved navigation, communications, and enhanced electronic warfare hardening. The upgrade includes replacing aging components and integrating advanced systems to improve survivability and targeting capabilities for both land and maritime strike missions.

feed.title: Insurance moves: CRC, MS Transverse, AXA XL, Arch, EverPeak, Alliant, Falcon Risk Services
feed.summary: This article details recent leadership changes across several insurance companies, including CRC Group, MS Transverse, AXA XL, Arch Capital Group, EverPeak Insurance, Alliant Insurance Services, and Falcon Risk Services. The roles highlighted range from office presidents and chief underwriting officers to regional directors, focusing on enhancing underwriting, program execution, and alternative risk capabilities in the US market. These moves underscore a strategic emphasis on strengthening expertise and operational leadership within the wholesale, fronting, and specialty insurance sectors.

feed.title: Bailard Inc. Has $1.70 Million Holdings in Fastenal Company $FAST
feed.summary: Bailard Inc. significantly increased its stake in Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) by 317.7% in Q3, now holding 34,648 shares valued at approximately $1.70 million. Fastenal recently reported Q4 EPS of $0.26, in line with estimates, and revenue of $2.03 billion, slightly missing expectations, with revenue up 11.1% year-over-year. The company also raised its quarterly dividend to $0.24, representing an annualized yield of about 2.1%.

feed.title: Leidos Shares Sold For $576,000 By Executive In Scheduled Trade
feed.summary: Elizabeth A. Porter, Sector President of Leidos Holdings Inc.'s Health and Civil segment, sold 3,000 shares of company stock for approximately $576,635 under a prearranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. This transaction, reported on January 23, 2026, is considered routine insider trading activity and not indicative of market conditions. Leidos maintains a strong market position, pays a dividend, and continues to focus on innovation and key contract wins.

feed.summary: On January 22nd ET, the KraneShares CSI China Internet ETF (KWEB.US) saw active options trading, with a total volume of 214.67K contracts. feed.title: Did AI Lung Imaging And New HCM Data Just Shift Bristol Myers Squibb’s (BMY) Investment Narrative?
authors: Simply Wall St Reviewer Sasha Jovanovic
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb recently entered a global licensing deal with Janux Therapeutics for a solid tumor therapy and collaborated with Microsoft to use AI for early lung cancer detection. The company also reported positive Phase 3 results for Camzyos in adolescent hypertrophic cardiomyopathy. These developments suggest a strategic shift towards oncology innovation, digital health integration, and lifecycle enhancement of existing therapies, potentially reshaping the company's investment narrative despite challenges like patent expiries and debt.

feed.title: Arkadios Wealth Advisors Raises Holdings in Johnson Controls International plc $JCI
feed.summary: Arkadios Wealth Advisors has significantly increased its stake in Johnson Controls International plc (JCI) by 121.9% in Q3, now owning 17,729 shares valued at $1.949 million. This move is part of a broader trend of institutional investors boosting their positions in JCI, bringing total institutional ownership to 90.05%, despite a VP selling a substantial number of shares. Johnson Controls reported strong Q3 earnings, beating estimates with $1.26 EPS and $6.44 billion in revenue, and issued a positive FY2026 guidance, alongside a quarterly dividend of $0.40.

feed.title: Humana (HUM) Valuation Check As Shares Lag And Fair Value Signals Point To Modest Undervaluation
feed.summary: Humana (HUM) shares have underperformed, being down 8% over the past year but are slightly positive year-to-date. Despite this, fair value narratives suggest the stock is modestly undervalued at approximately $287.38 per share compared to its current price of US$266.29. The company's efforts in clinical excellence and growth in value-based care models point to potential revenue increases, though risks like Medicare Advantage Stars litigation and reimbursement uncertainties could impact future earnings.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Buying Welltower (WELL) After A 40% One Year Rally?
feed.summary: Welltower (WELL) has seen a 40% rally over the last year, prompting investors to assess its current valuation. According to a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis, the stock appears fairly valued, trading at a slight discount to its estimated intrinsic value of $182.85 per share. However, its P/E ratio of 130.0x is significantly higher than both the industry average and Simply Wall St's proprietary "Fair Ratio" of 39.7x, suggesting it may be overvalued based on earnings multiples.

feed.title: L3Harris to Provide Advanced Technology for Korean Geostatio
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies has secured a contract from LIG Nex1 to supply a next-generation imaging payload for the Korea Meteorological Administration’s (KMA) geostationary weather satellite, GEO-KOMPSAT-5. The new 18-channel L3Harris GEO-KOMPSAT Meteorological Imager will enhance weather forecasting capabilities for the Korean Peninsula, improving the tracking of severe weather events like tropical cyclones, extreme precipitation, and wildfires. This contract reinforces L3Harris's long-standing support for the Republic of Korea's weather satellite programs.

feed.title: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) Given Consensus Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from 33 analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $276.76. Despite missing quarterly EPS estimates, the company reported a significant 79.7% year-over-year revenue increase to $1.59 billion and issued optimistic FY2025 EPS guidance. However, insider selling of over $12.97 million in the past 90 days, including substantial reductions by directors, indicates a notable decrease in insider ownership.

feed.title: MGM Resorts powers Las Vegas properties with solar energy
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International announced it is now powering 100% of the daytime electricity needs for its Las Vegas Strip resorts with solar energy. This achievement follows the integration of the new Escape Solar and Storage Project, significantly increasing the company's renewable energy capacity. The move accelerates MGM Resorts' goal of using 100% renewable electricity domestically by 2030, reducing long-term energy costs, and promoting a more resilient energy future.

feed.title: International Paper: Value Stock Or Value Trap? Wall Street Weighs In As The Stock Stalls Below Rece
feed.summary: International Paper's stock has recently stalled after a multi-month rally, prompting a debate among investors and Wall Street analysts about whether it's a value stock or a value trap. While some see a healthy consolidation and potential for future gains due to improving containerboard demand and cost discipline, others remain cautious, waiting for stronger catalysts. Analysts are split, with some suggesting modest upside and others forecasting double-digit returns if the packaging cycle recovers.

feed.title: CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) Given Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) has received an average "Moderate Buy" rating from 24 brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $83.59. The company recently beat Q3 earnings estimates and announced a $1.5 billion share repurchase program. Shares are currently trading around $66, with over 96% institutional ownership, and a high trailing P/E ratio.

feed.title: Sabre Corporation (SABR) Expands AI Travel Solutions with Biztrip Partnership and Strengthens Debt Profile
feed.summary: Sabre Corporation (SABR) has partnered with Biztrip AI to develop AI-powered corporate travel assistants, aiming to streamline travel booking and management. This collaboration involves Sabre's agentic APIs and marketplace with Biztrip AI's advanced AI, targeting various travel industry segments. Additionally, Sabre recently completed debt exchange offers, successfully extending the maturity of a significant portion of its senior secured debt to 2030.

feed.title: If You Had Bought J.W. Mays (NASDAQ:MAYS) Stock Five Years Ago, You'd Be Sitting On A 59% Loss, Today
feed.summary: This article analyzes the performance of J.W. Mays (NASDAQ:MAYS) stock over the past five years, revealing a 59% loss for shareholders. Despite an increase in EPS and revenue during this period, the stock price has fallen significantly, suggesting that market expectations were likely much higher in the past or that other fundamental issues are at play. The article recommends a closer look at the company's fundamentals and warns of three potential risks for investors.

feed.title: Rambus Names Shankarnarayan Bhat As Senior Engineering Director
feed.summary: Rambus has appointed Shankarnarayan Bhat as Senior Director of Engineering, where he will lead the MIC-IDC engineering organization. Bhat brings over two decades of experience in SoC development and large-scale engineering management from previous roles at Analog Devices India, Intel Corporation, and Qualcomm. His appointment aims to strengthen Rambus's global semiconductor development capabilities and expand its engineering efforts for complex, high-volume products.

feed.title: ACR Alpine Capital Research LLC Takes Position in iShares 0-3 Month Treasury Bond ETF $SGOV
feed.summary: ACR Alpine Capital Research LLC has acquired a new position in the iShares 0-3 Month Treasury Bond ETF (SGOV), purchasing 96,000 shares valued at approximately $9.67 million. This investment now represents 0.2% of ACR Alpine Capital Research LLC's portfolio, making it their 19th largest holding. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in SGOV, with several firms increasing their stakes in the ETF during the third quarter.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Utilities Companies: American Water (AWK) and WEC Energy Group (WEC)
feed.summary: Barclays analyst Nicholas Campanella maintained a Sell rating on American Water (AWK) with a price target of $122.00, while Mizuho Securities analyst Anthony Crowdell maintained a Buy rating on WEC Energy Group (WEC). The consensus for AWK is a Hold with an average price target of $131.20, and for WEC, it's a Moderate Buy with an average price target of $117.60, implying a 7.0% upside.

feed.title: Rather than expending significant effort on screening individual stocks, consider directly investing in ETFs
feed.summary: This article suggests that investors seeking dividend income should consider investing in ETFs focused on dividend-paying stocks, rather than spending extensive effort on individual stock screening. It highlights two specific ETFs, the Vanguard High Dividend Yield Index Fund ETF (VYM) and the Invesco S&P 500 Pure Value ETF (RPV), detailing their characteristics, fees, diversification, and performance. The author posits that these ETFs offer professionally managed selection, diversification, and competitive returns for income-oriented investors.

feed.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: NextEra Energy, Google and Constellation Energy
feed.summary: Zacks Investment Ideas highlights NextEra Energy (NEE), Google (GOOGL), and Constellation Energy (CEG) as key players in the AI energy sector. NextEra Energy, a large utility company, is positioned for a potential breakout ahead of its Q4 earnings due to its involvement in AI-driven energy solutions, including nuclear, solar, and battery storage, and recent deals with Google. Despite past underperformance, the company shows strong long-term growth prospects, a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), and an attractive valuation, particularly as it expands its energy generation for data centers.

feed.title: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) Receives Consensus Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Brokerages
feed.summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from 22 brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $123.89. Despite insider selling of over $9 million in the last three months, the company beat its latest quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. Investors are encouraged to look beyond the insider transactions and consider the positive analyst outlook and strong operational performance.

feed.title: 15,938 Shares in Rocket Lab Corporation $RKLB Bought by Allstate Corp
feed.summary: Allstate Corp acquired 15,938 shares of Rocket Lab Corporation (RKLB) in Q3, valued at approximately $764,000, amidst other institutional investors increasing their stakes. Despite a Neutron Stage 1 tank rupture introducing timeline uncertainty and negative headlines, Rocket Lab recently completed a successful Electron launch. feed.title: Goldman, HSBC See Stronger European Stock Rally on Growth Bets
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs and HSBC are projecting a stronger rally for European stocks this year, with strategists expecting the Stoxx Europe 600 Index to rise about 4% to 626 points by year-end. This optimistic outlook assumes a supportive economic environment despite potential trade and geopolitical tensions. Both banks have raised their targets since the last survey, indicating confidence in continued growth.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR) Given Average Rating of "Hold" by Analysts
feed.summary: Analysts have issued a consensus "Hold" rating for Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR), with an average 12-month price target of $91.38. This comes amidst significant insider selling, including EVP Vicente Reynal reducing his position by nearly half. Institutional investors hold a substantial 95.27% of the company's shares.

feed.title: General Mills, Inc. (NYSE:GIS) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Hold" from Brokerages
feed.summary: General Mills (NYSE:GIS) has received a consensus "Hold" recommendation from 21 brokerages, with an average one-year target price of $53.33. The company recently beat EPS estimates, reporting $1.10 per share against an estimated $1.03, but revenue was down 7.2% year-over-year. General Mills also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.61, offering a 5.5% yield.
